pages.title: Armorer
pages.text: Craft primary. Generic plate. Nineteen items.$(br2)Faction regalia (Desert, Island, Knight leader plate) does NOT live here — see $(l:factions/overview)Factions$(/l).

pages.title: Plate cores
pages.text: $(bold)Iron Plate Armor$(/) — netherite-scrap accents.$(br2)$(bold)Heavy Armor$(/) — heavy plate with netherite-scrap rivets.$(br2)$(bold)Warrior Armor$(/) (the Viking lamellar; renamed in-game to disambiguate from the Rogues warrior set). Chain-mail lined, bone-block trim.

pages.title: Shields and pirate plate
pages.text: $(bold)Iron, Golden, and Diamond Kite Shields.$(/) Matching-metal-block boss reinforcing the rim.$(br2)$(bold)Lady Maria set.$(/) Corsair-noble theme — iron-block frame, gold ingot, red wool. Head, chest, legs, feet.

pages.title: Notes
pages.text: Forge theme — iron plus netherite scrap.$(br2)Wooden and stone armor tiers stay normally craftable. Netherite stays a smithing-table upgrade.$(br2)Matching trader: the Armorer.
